assetKinds._comment: Asset extension signals the vendor shape: '.yml'/'.md' = single file vendored to its dest; '.zip' = a composite-action DIRECTORY (action.yml at root) vendored as <name>/. Integrity is always a file SHA256 (single file, or the inner action.yml).

_categories._comment: category = consumption intent. 'pipeline' = a building block composed INTO a pipeline (platform-agnostic; dest is consumer-chosen via -Path). 'repoScaffold' = repo furniture STAMPED into a repo at a FIXED dest; repoScaffold assets carry a 'repoType' naming the kind of repo they belong to (so e.g. a templatesRepo PR-validation is distinct from a future moduleRepo one).

registerModusOpsFeeds.description: Bootstrap a per-run SecretStore vault, store the SystemToken, register MAR + internal feeds with CredentialInfo + -CredentialProvider None + priority; unregister PSGallery unless allowed.

installModusOpsModules.description: Credential-agnostic install of modusOps / business modules (no token param). Always() teardown wipes the vault and repositories. The gh action inlines the GitHub Packages folder-casing fix.

sendTeamsChannelMessage.description: Post a success/failure/warning/note card to a Microsoft Teams channel webhook. (gh port untested on a live webhook.)

sendDiscordChannelMessage.description: Post a success/failure/warning/note embed to a Discord channel webhook.

connectMicrosoftGraph.description: Connect to Microsoft Graph (app-only, client-secret). Connection persists across later steps of the SAME job (not across jobs); place before the steps doing Graph work. Requires Microsoft.Graph.Authentication (installModusOpsModules).

getSharePointFile.description: Download a file from a SharePoint document library via Microsoft Graph. Expects an existing Graph connection - run connectMicrosoftGraph earlier in the same job. No credential params. Requires Microsoft.Graph.Authentication.

setSharePointFile.description: Upload a local file to a SharePoint document library via Microsoft Graph. Expects an existing Graph connection - run connectMicrosoftGraph earlier in the same job. No credential params. Requires Microsoft.Graph.Authentication.

templatesRepoPRValidation.description: [templates repo] PR-gate that lints azd + gh templates (structure / parameter / gh-action / secret) and blocks merge. gh = Actions workflow; azd = pipeline wired as a branch-policy build validation (PR comment via the PR-threads REST API).

templatesRepoRelease.description: [templates repo] Release furniture - cuts the next rolling-integer tag (vN) on merge to main. gh ALSO attaches the full template set + checksums.txt + manifest.json as release assets; azd cuts the tag only (Azure DevOps has no downloadable release assets - the tag is the pin consumers reference via a repository: resource).

templatesRepoPullRequest.description: [templates repo] Simple pull-request template (what changed / checklist / release impact). N+-appropriate: no SemVer type-of-change matrix.

templatesRepoIssue.description: [templates repo] Issue form: report a problem with a template/workflow, or request a new one.

templatesRepoIssueConfig.description: [templates repo] Issue-template chooser config (config.yml): blank issues off + a docs link. GitHub requires this exact filename.

_sets._comment: A 'set' is a named bundle applied in one call (Add-MORepoScaffold). type 'archetype' = a curated, tested-together list of steps (each a 'file' member, or a 'provision' step that runs an allow-listed scaffold cmdlet); type 'selector' = a derived query over templates' category/kind, evaluated against THIS manifest version (late-bound but deterministic, since each released manifest is immutable and the lock pins the version).

pipelineCore.description: The two load-bearing pipeline building blocks - register feeds + install modules - vendored as a pair (no repo furniture, no provisioning) so you can stand up and exercise the credential/install spine fast. Works on azd or gh.

templateLibrary.description: A modusOps template-library repo: PR-validation + rolling-integer release workflows + PR/issue furniture.

workflowSet.description: All repoScaffold workflow furniture for gh (derived - auto-includes new gh workflow templates).

azdWorkflowSet.description: All repoScaffold pipeline furniture for azd (derived - auto-includes new azd CI pipelines). The azd analog of workflowSet (kind 'pipeline' rather than 'workflow').

azdTemplateLibrary.description: An Azure DevOps modusOps templates-library repo: the template-linter PR-validation pipeline (wire as a branch-policy build validation) + the rolling-integer tag pipeline + a branch-policy provision step. azd tags rather than attaching assets (the tag is the pin consumers reference via a repository: resource).

azdOpsRepo.description: Stand up a modusOps Azure DevOps operations repo: vendor the register/install pair, then wire branch-policy + build-service repo permission over REST. Provide -With @{ repo; buildId } and the org/project context.
